'''dhodhashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glaciokarstic|glaciokarstic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glaciokarstic|glaciokarstic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhodhashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhashithi|dhodhashithi]] || [[word:dhodhashiji|dhodhashiji]] || [[word:dhodhashishi|dhodhashishi]] || [[word:dhodhashiki|dhodhashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhashuthuthu|dhodhashuthuthu]] || [[word:dhodhashujuju|dhodhashujuju]] || [[word:dhodhashushushu|dhodhashushushu]] || [[word:dhodhashukuku|dhodhashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhashuthu|dhodhashuthu]] || [[word:dhodhashuju|dhodhashuju]] || [[word:dhodhashushu|dhodhashushu]] || [[word:dhodhashuku|dhodhashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhashufthuf|dhodhashufthuf]] || [[word:dhodhashufjuf|dhodhashufjuf]] || [[word:dhodhashufshuf|dhodhashufshuf]] || [[word:dhodhashufkuf|dhodhashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhashethe|dhodhashethe]] || [[word:dhodhasheje|dhodhasheje]] || [[word:dhodhasheshe|dhodhasheshe]] || [[word:dhodhasheke|dhodhasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhashothotho|dhodhashothotho]] || [[word:dhodhashojojo|dhodhashojojo]] || [[word:dhodhashoshosho|dhodhashoshosho]] || [[word:dhodhashokoko|dhodhashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhashotho|dhodhashotho]] || [[word:dhodhashojo|dhodhashojo]] || [[word:dhodhashosho|dhodhashosho]] || [[word:dhodhashoko|dhodhashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhashofthof|dhodhashofthof]] || [[word:dhodhashofjof|dhodhashofjof]] || [[word:dhodhashofshof|dhodhashofshof]] || [[word:dhodhashofkof|dhodhashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŠthĂŠ|dhodhashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŠjĂŠ|dhodhashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŠshĂŠ|dhodhashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodhashĂŠkĂŠ|dhodhashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodhashathatha|dhodhashathatha]] || [[word:dhodhashajaja|dhodhashajaja]] || [[word:dhodhashashasha|dhodhashashasha]] || [[word:dhodhashakaka|dhodhashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodhashatha|dhodhashatha]] || [[word:dhodhashaja|dhodhashaja]] || [[word:dhodhashasha|dhodhashasha]] || [[word:dhodhashaka|dhodhashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodhashafthaf|dhodhashafthaf]] || [[word:dhodhashafjaf|dhodhashafjaf]] || [[word:dhodhashafshaf|dhodhashafshaf]] || [[word:dhodhashafkaf|dhodhashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhodhashasha|dhodhashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhashĂ«sha|dhodhashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhashrosha|dhodhashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhashmusha|dhodhashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhashyasha|dhodhashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhashnkshĂ«sha|godhodhashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhashnkrosha|godhodhashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhashnkmusha|godhodhashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhashnkyasha|godhodhashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhodhadhashasha|dhodhadhashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhadhashĂ«sha|dhodhadhashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhadhashrosha|dhodhadhashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhadhashmusha|dhodhadhashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhadhashyasha|dhodhadhashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhadhashnkshĂ«sha|godhodhadhashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhadhashnkrosha|godhodhadhashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhadhashnkmusha|godhodhadhashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhadhashnkyasha|godhodhadhashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhedhĂŠshasha|dhedhĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠshĂ«sha|dhedhĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠshrosha|dhedhĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠshmusha|dhedhĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhedhĂŠshyasha|dhedhĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|godhedhĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠshnkrosha|godhedhĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠshnkmusha|godhedhĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhedhĂŠshnkyasha|godhedhĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhodhfashasha|dhodhfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodhfashĂ«sha|dhodhfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodhfashrosha|dhodhfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodhfashmusha|dhodhfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodhfashyasha|dhodhfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodhfashnkshĂ«sha|godhodhfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodhfashnkrosha|godhodhfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodhfashnkmusha|godhodhfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodhfashnkyasha|godhodhfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
